## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run visual:check`
- [ ] `npm run rust:test`

## Privacy Check

- [ ] No `.env`, secrets, local databases, blobs, private logs, or real clipboard payloads are included.
- [ ] Screenshots, tests, examples, and logs use synthetic data only.

## Notes

Copicu is CopyQ-inspired, not CopyQ-compatible. For CopyQ-inspired changes, describe the product value and user workflow.
